title: Bulbbul
tmdbOverview: A child bride grows up to be an enigmatic woman presiding over her household, harboring a painful past as supernatural murders of men plague her village.
synopsis: Released in 2020, Bulbbul is a horror, fantasy and thriller film from India. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
